author: NETWORG
name: Power Platform: Generative Page (GenPage)
description: Creates a GenPage project with Rollup bundling. Every *.tsx file at the project root is a page; the initial page is named after the project. Build with 'dotnet build' — the SDK discovers pages by filename, generates runtime types, bundles one ESM file per page, and wires solution-owned uxagentprojects metadata.

SolutionName.description: Optional sibling solution project name. When provided, the template runs 'dotnet add ../<SolutionName>/<SolutionName>.csproj reference <this project>' after scaffold.

postActions.description: Add GenPage project reference to the solution project when SolutionName is provided

manualInstructions.text: Run dotnet add ../<solution-name>/<solution-name>.csproj reference <this project> if automatic wiring was skipped.
